header_hero_text: Frontend Engineer at Pleo. Originally from Manchester, currently living in Berlin.
about_section_one: I have a deep passion for building elegant, performant user experiences and specialize in modern frontend architecture using {techOne} and {techTwo}. My focus is on creating intuitive user interfaces, with a particular interest in frontend developer tooling.
about_section_two: Outside of the visual layer, I'm interested in the systems and decisions underneath great products and spend my free time learning beyond pure frontend work.
pleo_experience: Built and maintained subscriptions and recurring vendor features, advanced analytics dashboards with filters, virtualized vendor tables, and integrated Metabase analytics. Also drove UI/UX improvements across the platform with contributions to the company design system.
raiu_description: Ultra fast, minimal API to return formatted in-game ranks.
goji_description: Lightweight and lightning quick package.json script runner.
